title: data-kr memo-fetch pack (Tier 2 only — DART deferred)
description: Output of `pack.py --pack memo-fetch --ticker <KR ticker>`. Full data bundle for a Korean equity memo: yfinance `info` + 5y `history` + annual + quarterly financials. **Tier 2 only**: Korean primary-source equity (DART, dart.fss.or.kr) is not wired in this skill yet — `_provenance.primary_source_status` is always 'deferred'. Treat all financials as unverified scraper output and surface this caveat in any downstream memo.

info.description: Same shape as snapshot.info — yfinance info dict.

financials_annual.description: yfinance `financials --period annual` output (Tier 2 scraper). Keys are yfinance-driven; the canonical subset is enumerated below.

financials_quarterly.description: yfinance `financials --period quarterly` output. Same shape as financials_annual but with `period: 'quarterly'`.

history.description: T1 canonical OHLCV alias — flat list of OHLCV rows (same content as price_history.data). Top-level for analysis-technical. Cross-country symmetric with data-us per docs/normalization-contract.md.

income_statement.description: T3 canonical income statement (Tier 2 yfinance fallback per ADR-0003). Annual depth 5, most-recent-first. Contains revenue / operating_income / ebit / net_income arrays + _meta.

cash_flow.description: T3 canonical cash flow (Tier 2 yfinance). operating_cash_flow / capex / fcf + _meta.

balance_sheet.description: T3 canonical balance sheet (Tier 2 yfinance). long_term_debt / short_term_debt / total_debt / cash + _meta.

shares_outstanding.description: Absolute share count from yfinance info.sharesOutstanding.

current_price.description: Latest market price from yfinance info.regularMarketPrice (KRW).

kr_specific.description: KR-specific extension block per Principle 3. Notes for DART deferral, K-IFRS consolidated-basis caveat.

price_history.description: Raw yfinance `history --period 5y` envelope. Renamed from `history` per ADR-0002 staging-tier (Principle 1: raw never deleted).

primary_source_note.description: Must mention DART (전자공시시스템, dart.fss.or.kr) and treat-as-unverified caveat.
